subtitle: Agentic customer readiness and execution cockpit
customer_ask: We need a secure on-prem enterprise RAG assistant for support engineers with citations, named owners, and a one quarter pilot timeline.
objective: We need a secure on-prem enterprise RAG assistant for support engineers with citations, named owners, and a one quarter pilot timeline.

blockers.message: Security readiness is 44/100. Darla needs stronger proof before this can be presented as deployment-ready.
Timeline readiness is 55/100. Darla needs stronger proof before this can be presented as deployment-ready.

snippets: For enterprise pilots, teams often need on-prem or hybrid deployment options, GPU planning, model endpoint configuration, and a documented vector database strategy.

# NVIDIA Stack Alignment

NVIDIA RAG Blueprint deployments typically align around document ingestion, retrieval, reranking, and grounded answer generation.

# SHI Customer Readiness Signals

SHI opportunity reviews are strongest when the team can point to a defined use case, an executive sponsor, named delivery ownership, and a measurable business KPI for the first pilot.
Customer readiness improves when the engagement includes an agreed timeline, success criteria, and a clear path from discovery to proof of concept.

# Secure Ground Truth Controls

Answers should be grounded in approved internal documents and should return citations for every material claim.

next_actions: Complete a security review before scaling ingestion beyond the pilot corpus.
Lock approved sources and require evidence-backed answers in every demo flow.
Build a two-week POC plan with milestones, blockers, and exit criteria.
Set a review checkpoint for readiness after the first ingestion run.
Confirm executive sponsor and measurable pilot KPI.
Frame the first release around one customer workflow with business impact.
